title: systemic infection in Drosophila
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a4p3p","text":"This protocol describes how to systemically infect fruit flies with either a bacterial or viral infection through pricking the mesopleuron of the thorax","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"gmlr","text":"Always keep pins in a safe, enclosed place when not in use.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1dm2m","text":"Always point pin end of syringe rod away from person when placed on bench.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2s9ai","text":"All pins should be disposed of in a yellow sharps bins.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"qmqq","text":"Appropriate Health \u0026 Safety guidelines for the virus/bacteria speices being used should be followed.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Katy M Monteith
